description:
Get my free 5-day AI playbook (the steps I used to help build a $25M+ startup): https://the-ai-playbook.com/trap

In this video, I break down the 3 Claude Code traps that Anthropic doesn't warn anyone about and that 99% of people fall into. And unfortunately, most don't realize until they've wasted hundreds of hours. 

Whether you're using Claude Code to build products, custom tools, or automations...these problems will hit you. I'll show you exactly how to avoid them using the same systems I've used to run an engineering team at JPM and help non-technical founders ship products to 100,000+ users.

Videos Referenced: 
Claude Skills Use Cases https://youtu.be/PdAqzvOzi50?si=Ncg8QlUx8yevAILA

Timestamps:
(0:00) - The Claude Code Trap Nobody Warns You About
(0:27) - Trap 1: Claude Solved the Wrong Problem
(2:12) - How to Define "Working" Before You Build
(3:38) - Setting Up Permissions the Right Way
(4:08) - Trap 2: Whack-A-Mole Bugs
(7:28) - Trap 3: Half-Baked Everything

--------
FOR INDIVIDUALS:
- Free 5-day playbook on building AI systems that compound (the system behind an 8-figure startup): https://the-ai-playbook.com/trap
- Use BuildPartner to build 10x faster with Claude Code (try free): https://buildpartner.ai/trap

FOR BUSINESSES, Ways to work with me:
- Want AI systems built into your operations? https://theincubator.xyz/ops/trap
-  Want to build a SaaS product without hiring a CTO? https://www.theincubator.xyz/eng/trap
--------

If you're new here, I'm Austin Marchese. How I got here...
16: First business (SAT Math Tutor)
22: Graduated Stevens Tech, 4.0, College Basketball, software engineering job at JPM
23: Bitcoin ATM company + building algorithms for a professional gambler (fun story)
24: Started creating content, grew 100k+ followers, built first agency, The Incubator
25: Scaled agency to 15+ team members, $75K/M while working full time
26: Quit my job, joined a startup called IYK
27: Became COO of a $25M+ tech startup, worked with Ed Sheeran, Chance the Rapper and more
28: Built a $20M+ real estate portfolio in the background
29: Transitioned from IYK, re-launched The Incubator, grew it to a 6-figure biz in 30 days. Now building BuildPartner.ai

To everyone who's spending time learning and putting the work in, cheers. Anyone can make comments from the sidelines but not everyone can build...

- Austin

Follow/Subscribe

- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/austin.marchese/
- Youtube: https://www.youtube.com/@austin.marchese
